languages.text: "Он не слышит вас. Но я признателен, что вы все еще видите в нем человека".
"He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."
languages.original_text: "Он не слышит вас. Но я признателен, что вы все еще видите в нем человека".

traits.locale_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."
"He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."
"He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

languages.text: «No puede oírle. Pero agradezco que aún lo considere un ser humano».
languages.original_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

traits.locale_text: «No puede oírle. Pero agradezco que aún lo considere un ser humano».

languages.text: “他听不见。但我很感激，您仍然把他当作人来看待。”
languages.original_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

traits.locale_text: “他听不见。但我很感激，您仍然把他当作人来看待。”

languages.text: « Il ne vous entend pas, mais je vous remercie de la considération dont vous faites preuve en le traitant malgré tout comme un être humain. »
languages.original_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne vous entend pas, mais je vous remercie de la considération dont vous faites preuve en le traitant malgré tout comme un être humain. »

languages.text: "Sizi duyamaz. Ancak onu hâlâ bir insan olarak görmenizi takdir ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

traits.locale_text: "Sizi duyamaz. Ancak onu hâlâ bir insan olarak görmenizi takdir ediyorum."

languages.text: "Er kann Euch nicht hören. Aber ich weiß zu schätzen, dass Ihr ihn noch als menschliches Wesen betrachtet."
languages.original_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

traits.locale_text: "Er kann Euch nicht hören. Aber ich weiß zu schätzen, dass Ihr ihn noch als menschliches Wesen betrachtet."

languages.text: 「彼にはあなたの声は聞こえません。しかし、あなたが今なお彼を一人の人間として見てくれること、ありがたく思います」
languages.original_text: "He cannot hear you. But I appreciate that you still see him as a human being."

traits.locale_text: 「彼にはあなたの声は聞こえません。しかし、あなたが今なお彼を一人の人間として見てくれること、ありがたく思います」
